name: Mohammed Efaz
description: Editorial channel for original overviews, curation, synthesis, and site-owned publishing pages.

name: DawahWise
description: DawahWise is the official channel of Mansur and Hashim, featuring Speakers Corner debates, livestreams, and dawah training sessions that aim to empower Muslim apologetics globally. The channel is committed to sharing the message of Islam through education, public discourse, and structured theological engagement."Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom and good instruction, and argue with them in a way that is best" (Quran 16:125). The channel accepts support through Patreon (patreon.com/dawahwise), PayPal (paypal.me/dawahwise), and GoFundMe (gofund.me/dba0c96f). https://www.dawahwise.com
